allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('catalyst_analysis_db/macro_regime/latest.json'\)\); nl=d.get\('net_liquidity',{}\); print\('roc_4w:', nl.get\('roc_4w'\)\); print\('current_T:', nl.get\('current_T'\)\); print\('walcl_T:', nl.get\('walcl_T'\)\); print\('regime:', nl.get\('regime'\)\); print\('has roc_series:', bool\(nl.get\('roc_series'\)\)\)")
